```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.85em;">

  <div style="border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;background:#1E1E2E;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);">
   <div style="background:linear-gradient(180deg,#3A3950,#2A2940);padding:0.4em 0.7em;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.35em;">
    <span style="width:0.5em;height:0.5em;border-radius:50%;background:#FF5F56;"></span>
    <span style="width:0.5em;height:0.5em;border-radius:50%;background:#FFBD2E;"></span>
    <span style="width:0.5em;height:0.5em;border-radius:50%;background:#27C93F;"></span>
    <span style="margin-left:0.5em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;">q-* · quick utils</span>
   </div>
   <div style="padding:0.7em 0.95em 0.85em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;line-height:1.85;text-align:left;color:#F8F7F0;">
    <div><span style="color:#3DA18A;">$</span> <span style="color:#FFB84D;">q-brew</span> <span style="color:#5C6B80;">// brew up</span></div>
    <div><span style="color:#3DA18A;">$</span> <span style="color:#FFB84D;">q-pull</span> <span style="color:#5C6B80;">// pull repos</span></div>
    <div><span style="color:#3DA18A;">$</span> <span style="color:#FFB84D;">q-hide</span> <span style="color:#5C6B80;">// hide windows</span></div>
    <div><span style="color:#3DA18A;">$</span> <span style="color:#FFB84D;">q-close</span> <span style="color:#5C6B80;">// close apps</span></div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;background:#1E1E2E;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);">
   <div style="background:linear-gradient(180deg,#3A3950,#2A2940);padding:0.4em 0.7em;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.35em;">
    <span style="width:0.5em;height:0.5em;border-radius:50%;background:#FF5F56;"></span>
    <span style="width:0.5em;height:0.5em;border-radius:50%;background:#FFBD2E;"></span>
    <span style="width:0.5em;height:0.5em;border-radius:50%;background:#27C93F;"></span>
    <span style="margin-left:0.5em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;">cd-* · shortcuts</span>
   </div>
   <div style="padding:0.7em 0.95em 0.85em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;line-height:1.85;text-align:left;color:#F8F7F0;">
    <div><span style="color:#3DA18A;">$</span> <span style="color:#69B4F0;">cd-obsidian</span> <span style="color:#5C6B80;">→ ~/Vault</span></div>
    <div><span style="color:#3DA18A;">$</span> <span style="color:#69B4F0;">cd-website</span> <span style="color:#5C6B80;">→ ~/sites</span></div>
    <div><span style="color:#3DA18A;">$</span> <span style="color:#69B4F0;">cd-github</span> <span style="color:#5C6B80;">→ ~/code</span></div>
    <div style="opacity:0.4;">&nbsp;</div>
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.85em;text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;">
  one line each in <code style="color:#5654A2;">.zshrc</code> &nbsp;·&nbsp; <strong style="color:#C4881A;">real time saved daily</strong>
 </div>

</div>
```
